name: mcp-pinot
description: Explore Apache Pinot with read-only SQL, typed metadata tools, and preview-first configuration changes.
long_description: This Python MCP server exposes agent-oriented tools for Apache Pinot analytics: discover tables, inspect schemas and segments, run read-only SQL, and preview schema or table-config changes before applying them. It runs over STDIO for desktop MCP hosts and supports Streamable HTTP for authenticated remote deployments.

tools.name: test_connection
tools.description: Diagnose broker, controller, and query connectivity.

tools.name: read_query
tools.description: Run one read-only Pinot SQL query and return a bounded page of rows.

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List Pinot table names visible through the configured table filter.

tools.name: get_table_size
tools.description: Get reported and estimated storage size for one table.

tools.name: list_segments
tools.description: List exact segment names for one table.

tools.name: get_segment_index_metadata
tools.description: Get per-column index metadata for one exact segment.

tools.name: list_segment_metadata
tools.description: Page through row, size, and time metadata for a table's segments.

tools.name: reload_table_filters
tools.description: Preview table-filter YAML and apply the unchanged candidate with its confirmation token.

tools.name: create_schema
tools.description: Preview or create a Pinot schema from a JSON object.

tools.name: update_schema
tools.description: Preview or update an existing Pinot schema.

tools.name: get_schema
tools.description: Get one Pinot schema and its column definitions.

tools.name: create_table_config
tools.description: Preview or create a Pinot table configuration.

tools.name: update_table_config
tools.description: Preview or update an existing Pinot table configuration.

tools.name: get_table_config
tools.description: Get indexing, retention, tenant, and ingestion configuration for one table.

controller_url.title: Pinot Controller URL
controller_url.description: HTTP(S) endpoint of the Pinot Controller

broker_url.title: Pinot Broker URL
broker_url.description: HTTP(S) endpoint of the Pinot Broker (host:port)
